# Entity Schema Reference

An Entity (Object) schema creates both an ORM model class and a database table.

## Built-in Columns (Inherited)

Every entity inherits these from `BaseEntity`:

| Column | Type | Purpose |
|--------|------|---------|
| `Id` | Guid | Primary key (auto-generated UUID) |
| `CreatedOn` | DateTime | Record creation timestamp |
| `CreatedBy` | Lookup → Contact | Creator |
| `ModifiedOn` | DateTime | Last modification timestamp |
| `ModifiedBy` | Lookup → Contact | Last modifier |
| `ProcessListeners` | Integer | Process subscription count |

## Common Parent Schemas

| Parent | Extra Columns | Use |
|--------|---------------|-----|
| `BaseEntity` | Id, Created/Modified audit | Standard entities |
| `BaseLookup` | + Name, Description | Lookup/reference tables |
| `BaseCodeLookup` | + Name, Description, Code | Coded lookups |

## Column Types (DataValueType)

| DataValueType | DB Type (MSSQL) | DB Type (PostgreSQL) |
|---------------|-----------------|---------------------|
| Guid | uniqueidentifier | uuid |
| Text/ShortText | nvarchar(50) | character varying(50) |
| MediumText | nvarchar(250) | character varying(250) |
| LongText | nvarchar(500) | character varying(500) |
| MaxSizeText | nvarchar(max) | text |
| Integer | int | integer |
| Float | float | double precision |
| Money | decimal(18,2) | numeric(18,2) |
| Boolean | bit | boolean |
| Date | date | date |
| Time | time | time |
| DateTime | datetime2 | timestamp |
| Lookup | uniqueidentifier (FK) | uuid (FK) |
| Image | uniqueidentifier → SysImage | uuid → SysImage |

## Relationships

### Lookup (Many-to-One)
Column with `DataValueType: Lookup` + `referenceSchemaName`.
Creates a foreign key to the referenced entity's `Id`.

```
UsrOrder.UsrStatusId → UsrOrderStatus.Id
```

### Detail (One-to-Many)
No column on parent. Child entity has a lookup column pointing back.

```
UsrOrderLine.UsrOrderId → UsrOrder.Id
```

## Naming Conventions

- Prefix: `Usr` (or registered vendor prefix)
- Case: PascalCase
- Entity: `UsrVacationRequest`
- Columns: `UsrStartDate`, `UsrEmployeeId`, `UsrStatus`
- Lookup entity: `UsrVacationStatus` (inherits `BaseLookup`)

## Entity Schema JSON Structure

```json
{
  "name": "UsrVacationRequest",
  "caption": "Vacation request",
  "parentSchemaName": "BaseEntity",
  "columns": [
    {
      "name": "UsrName",
      "caption": "Name",
      "dataValueType": "MediumText",
      "isRequired": true
    },
    {
      "name": "UsrEmployee",
      "caption": "Employee",
      "dataValueType": "Lookup",
      "referenceSchemaName": "Contact",
      "isRequired": true
    },
    {
      "name": "UsrStartDate",
      "caption": "Start date",
      "dataValueType": "Date",
      "isRequired": true
    },
    {
      "name": "UsrEndDate",
      "caption": "End date",
      "dataValueType": "Date",
      "isRequired": true
    },
    {
      "name": "UsrStatus",
      "caption": "Status",
      "dataValueType": "Lookup",
      "referenceSchemaName": "UsrVacationStatus"
    },
    {
      "name": "UsrNotes",
      "caption": "Notes",
      "dataValueType": "MaxSizeText"
    }
  ]
}
```

## System Metadata Tables

| Table | Purpose |
|-------|---------|
| `SysPackage` | Installed packages |
| `SysSchema` | All schema metadata |
| `SysSettings` | System settings key-value |
| `SysAdminUnit` | Users and roles |
| `SysEntitySchemaOperationRight` | Object-level permissions |
| `SysEntitySchemaColumnRight` | Column-level permissions |
